titles.title: Let Jesus Come Into Your Heart

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If you are tired of The load of your sin, Let Jesus come into your heart; If you desire a new life to begin, Let Jesus come into your heart.

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines: If'tis for purity now that you sigh, Let Jesus come into your heart; Fountains for cleansing Are flowing near by, Let Jesus come into your heart.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If there's a tempest Your voice cannot still, Let Jesus come into your heart; If there's a void This world never can fill, Let Jesus come into your heart.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: If you would join The glad songs of the blest, Let Jesus come into your heart; If you would enter The mansions of rest, Let Jesus come into your heart.
